deck_goal: Help Chleo Lee evaluate and pitch a practical Singapore community band room without signing a risky lease too early.

sessions.summary: Reviewed user-reported failures where stale edit storage injected old slide text into new layouts and controls overlapped footer zones. Repaired the deck controller, protected chrome spacing and reran browser QA.

slide_reviews.note: Competitor table now fits inside protected content bounds with tighter rows.
Customer discovery slide explains interview targets without mixing property-option content.
Acoustics slide keeps treatment/isolation distinction readable above source lane.
Gear slide remains dense but readable and uses appendix for deeper model detail.
Startup cost title scale reduced so the bar chart is the visual focus.
Break-even title scale reduced and corrupt local edit restore regression tested.
90-day sprint title scale reduced so the Gantt chart keeps enough vertical space.

recurring_issues: Do not restore local edits into a changed deck by element index.
Do not let source, metadata or controls share the content grid.
Do not trust URL hash screenshots unless hash navigation is wired to the deck controller.
new_rules: HTML decks with edit mode need versioned or signature-checked saved edits.
Presenter controls need a reserved control band on short laptop screens.
Playwright QA must render every slide after structural deck changes.
